title: Luis Enrique: PSG-Bayern 'best match' as coach
summary: PSG head coach Luis Enrique praised his team's 5-4 victory over Bayern Munich as the greatest match of his coaching career. The record-breaking result showcases the attacking prowess of both European giants in a Champions League semifinal.
content: Paris Saint-Germain head coach Luis Enrique hailed his side's record-breaking 5-4 win over Bayern Munich as the best match he's ever been involved in during his coaching career.

zh.title: 路易斯·恩里克：PSG对拜仁是其执教生涯中'最佳比赛'
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼主教练路易斯·恩里克将球队5-4击败拜仁慕尼黑的胜利称为其执教生涯中最伟大的比赛。这场创纪录的胜利展示了这两支欧洲豪门在欧冠半决赛中的进攻实力。

title: Banned Kompany's seat in PSG-Bayern epic 'no fun'
summary: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany was unable to be in the dugout during the thrilling 5-4 Champions League semifinal against PSG. Kompany's absence from the sidelines deprived the manager of the opportunity to influence the game tactically during the dramatic encounter.
content: Vincent Kompany might have been the only spectator in the Parc des Princes who didn't enjoy watching the thrilling Champions League semifinal game between his Bayern Munich team and PSG.

zh.title: 被禁赛的科帕尼无法在PSG对拜仁史诗对决中坐镇教练席'很遗憾'
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑主教练文森特·科帕尼在与PSG的激烈5-4欧冠半决赛中无法坐在教练席上。科帕尼缺席场边，无法在这场戏剧性的对决中进行战术指挥。

title: Red cards for mouth-covering approved before WC
summary: FIFA has approved a new rule resulting in red card dismissals for players who cover their mouths when confronting opponents at the 2026 World Cup. The rule aims to improve visibility and enforce discipline during player confrontations.
content: Players who cover their mouths when confronting an opponent will be sent off at this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 遮挡嘴巴遭红牌罚下的规则在世界杯前获批
zh.summary: 国际足联批准了一项新规则，对在2026世界杯期间与对手对峙时遮挡嘴巴的球员进行红牌罚下。该规则旨在提高可见度并在球员冲突期间强化纪律。

title: FIFA tweaks yellow-card ban rules ahead of WC
summary: FIFA has expanded its yellow card amnesty rule for the 2026 World Cup to reduce suspensions during knockout rounds. The modification aims to keep key players available during crucial elimination-stage matches.
content: FIFA has expanded its yellow card amnesty rule for the 2026 World Cup, aiming to reduce player suspensions during the elimination rounds.

zh.title: FIFA在世界杯前调整黄牌禁赛规则
zh.summary: 国际足联扩展了2026年世界杯的黄牌赦免规则，以减少淘汰赛阶段的禁赛。这一修改旨在在至关重要的淘汰赛阶段保持主力球员的可用性。

title: Iran absent as FIFA meetings start before WCup
summary: Iran's soccer federation did not send representatives to a major AFC leadership meeting ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The absence marks a notable diplomatic moment during pre-tournament coordination among Asian nations.
content: Representatives from Iran's soccer federation were not present Tuesday at the largest formal meeting of Asia's soccer leaders before this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 伊朗缺席2026世界杯前的国际足联会议
zh.summary: 伊朗足协未向2026年世界杯前召开的亚足联领导层主要会议派遣代表。这一缺席在亚洲国家赛前协调期间标志着一个值得注意的外交时刻。

title: Ødegaard: Title-chasing Arsenal in 'amazing positi...
summary: Arsenal captain Martin Ødegaard expressed confidence that his team is positioned to make a stronger title challenge this season. The midfielder believes the club has the quality and momentum to compete for the Premier League crown.
content: Arsenal skipper Martin Ødegaard has said his side are ready to go a step further in the title race.

zh.title: 厄德高：争冠的阿森纳处于"惊人的位置"
zh.summary: 阿森纳队长马丁·厄德高表达了对球队本赛季能够发起更强大争冠挑战的信心。这位中场球员相信俱乐部有能力和势头争夺英超冠军。

title: PSG vs. Bayern was one of the greatest matches Cha...
summary: PSG and Bayern Munich produced an exceptional 5-4 Champions League semifinal encounter that showcased attacking brilliance from both sides. The high-scoring result left the tie balanced as neither team achieved a decisive advantage.
content: European giants PSG and Bayern Munich produced one of the greatest games you'll ever see. Yet neither will be happy at a 5-4 score that keeps the tie hanging in the balance.

zh.title: PSG对拜仁是欧冠历史上最伟大的比赛之一
zh.summary: PSG和拜仁慕尼黑在欧冠半决赛中呈现了一场5-4的精彩对攻，展现了双方出色的进攻能力。高比分的结果使得双方势均力敌，谁都没有获得决定性优势。

title: VAR review: Were Bayern wronged by PSG penalty awa...
summary: A VAR-reviewed penalty decision in favor of PSG against Bayern Munich may have been the decisive moment in the 5-4 semifinal encounter. The handball call drew scrutiny from observers questioning its accuracy.
content: PSG were awarded a potentially decisive penalty for a Bayern Munich handball in a match for the ages.

zh.title: VAR审核：拜仁是否因PSG点球判罚遭冤？
zh.summary: 一项对PSG有利的点球判罚决定可能是这场5-4半决赛的转折点。这个手球判罚引起了观众的质疑和讨论。
